title: Bhadrachalam Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Bhadrachalam, with a Z-Score of +4.71. The city has been issued a critical level warning with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Bhadrachalam has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 15.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, and the wind speed is approximately 9.4 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's energy demand is expected to surge due to increased cooling needs, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately to mitigate the effects on the city's infrastructure and residents.
agri_impact: Crops at risk due to extreme heat
